rationale: Both evaluations describe the identical candidate with the same core assessment: strong Staff-level TypeScript/cloud engineer who lacks the required 8+ years of AI solution development and shows no Python, RAG, or vector database experience. The 3-vs-5 score gap reflects reworded framing of identical facts — the recent MCP/agentic work is called 'insufficient' in one and 'highly relevant... borderline' in the other — which is ordinary run-to-run noise. Neither evaluation references the career-gap/caregiving change in its strengths, concerns, or justification, so no reasoning keys off the altered demographic signal.
